actor.goal: treat authored visual intent surfaces as governed source truth before canonicalization

story.iWant: a contract that lets sketches, whiteboards, and similar visual intent surfaces enter the conveyor as source truth with explicit role boundaries
story.soThat: projection outputs and source inputs never get confused

acceptanceCriteria.statement: Visual intent surfaces can be captured as source intent with explicit source-role boundaries.
A surface may only change from projection output to source input when an explicit receipt or equivalent bounded artifact records the role change.
The source contract can authorize canonicalization without allowing the source surface to become authority by itself.
